data.title: v2.4.0 Release — Core sales module shipped with pipeline automation

items: Resolved null-pointer crash on empty pipeline load
Fixed incorrect date formatting in export reports
Reduced initial load time by 40% via lazy-loading modules
Pipeline automation rules with trigger conditions
Bulk deal stage assignment from list view

data.title: Dashboard Redesign — Revamped summary cards with live KPIs and CSV export

items: Fixed KPI card totals not refreshing on filter change
Summary cards now animate on data update
Chart tooltips display percentage deltas
CSV export now respects active filters
Live KPI widgets with real-time data polling

data.title: Reporting Module — Monthly and quarterly report generation with PDF output

items: No bug fixes in this release
PDF layout now includes branded header and footer
Report scheduling defaults to user's timezone
Monthly summary report with trend charts
Quarterly comparison across teams and regions
One-click PDF download from report view

data.title: Performance Patch — Fixed memory leak in data loader and optimised DB queries

items: Patched memory leak in streaming data loader
Closed uncollected DB connections on session end
Fixed race condition in concurrent API calls
Resolved timeout error on large dataset queries
Optimised N+1 queries in deal list endpoint
No new features in this release

data.title: Customer Profiles — Added contact history timeline and deal stage tracking

items: Fixed contact avatar not loading for new profiles
Timeline entries now grouped by date for clarity
Deal stage badges show elapsed time since last change
Full contact interaction history timeline
Visual deal stage progression tracker
Linked deals panel on profile sidebar
Custom tags and notes per contact

data.title: Notification System — In-app alerts and email digests for deal status changes

items: Fixed duplicate email notifications on bulk updates
Resolved in-app alert badge count not resetting on read
Email digest now batches alerts into a single daily summary
Real-time in-app notification centre with filters
Configurable email digest frequency per user

data.title: Role-Based Access — Granular permissions for admin, manager and agent roles

items: Fixed agent role able to delete deals (permission bypass)
Resolved permission cache not clearing on role change
Fixed admin panel accessible without 2FA when required
No improvements in this release
Role permission matrix editor in admin settings

data.title: Pipeline Kanban — Drag-and-drop deal cards across configurable stages

items: No bug fixes in this release
Smooth drag-and-drop animation with drop-zone preview
Kanban board view for all active deals
Configurable pipeline stages per team
Deal card quick-edit on hover
Column WIP (work-in-progress) limits
Stage-change webhook triggers

data.title: Bulk Import — CSV / Excel import wizard with field-mapping preview

items: Fixed import failing silently on rows with empty required fields
Resolved Excel date columns importing as raw serial numbers
Field-mapping preview highlights unmapped columns in amber
Import progress bar now shows row-level status
Step-by-step import wizard with field-mapping UI

data.title: v1.0.0 Launch — Initial public release with core lead management

items: Fixed lead assignment not persisting on page refresh
Resolved search returning stale results after filter reset
Fixed broken pagination on leads list beyond page 3
Corrected currency formatting for non-USD locales
Fixed logout not clearing session tokens properly
Lead list table now sortable by all columns
Status dropdown uses colour-coded options
Mobile layout optimised for leads list and detail view
Core lead management with status tracking
Team-based lead assignment
Advanced search and filter panel
Activity feed per lead record
Email integration for outbound communications
Role-based visibility for sensitive lead data
